reachability_artifacts: built sworn maintainability review run from cmd/sworn/maintainability_composition_test.go:TestMaintainabilityCompositionBinaryReachability reaches C-07 and fails closed at the next unavailable gate
release_benefit: Sworn can integrate declared shared files deterministically without trusting machine-local Git behavior.

design_decisions.choice: Land C-07 before C-04 and derive shared-path composition only from committed blobs on the serial maintainability command path.
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified under Brad's 2026-07-16 Coach instruction to follow the orchestrator recommendation: move S10 before S07 and use canonical committed-blob composition.
design_decisions.rationale: C-04 cannot recognize synchronization provenance until every both-parents-changed shared path has one configuration-independent identity.

positive_scenarios: Two declared additive regions compose to one stable committed blob across hostile Git configurations.
negative_scenarios: An undeclared, conflicting, hand-resolved, mode-mismatched, or driver-dependent result blocks before mutation.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: Making the exception executable removes configuration-dependent merge outcomes from parallel release integration.
